org.apache.dubbo.remoting

类 RemotingException

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.lang.Throwable
      • java.lang.Exception
        • org.apache.dubbo.remoting.RemotingException
  • 所有已实现的接口:
    Serializable
    直接已知子类:
    ExecutionException, RemotingException, TimeoutException

    public class RemotingException
extends Exception
    RemotingException. (API, Prototype, ThreadSafe)
    另请参阅:
    CompletableFuture.get(), Endpoint.send(Object, boolean), ExchangeChannel.request(Object), ExchangeChannel.request(Object, int), Transporter.bind(org.apache.dubbo.common.URL, ChannelHandler), Transporter.connect(org.apache.dubbo.common.URL, ChannelHandler), 序列化表格
